title: 雨夜里 一个女孩站在城市
logline: 雨夜里，一个女孩站在城市街头，最后转身离开。
visualStyle: cinematic realism, moody blue-red lighting, soft contrast
musicStyle: slow atmospheric electronic with distant city ambience
colorPalette: blue neon, red accents, silver reflections, wet asphalt glow
environmentNotes: Keep the same rainy city street, same neon palette, and restrained background movement throughout.
motionRule: Each shot should focus on one simple action with natural motion and no exaggerated gestures.
exportSpec: 1080x1920, H.264, clean master first, then subtitle version.

character.name: Lin
character.appearance: young woman, sharp bob haircut, pale skin, restrained expression
character.wardrobe: dark long coat, understated boots, minimal accessories
character.consistencyNotes: Keep the same face shape, hairstyle, outfit silhouette, and key lighting ratio across all shots.

shots.subject: Lin stands alone under a flickering sign
shots.action: keeps still for a moment and breathes slowly
shots.style: cinematic realism, moody blue-red lighting, soft contrast
shots.environment: Keep the same rainy city street, same neon palette, and restrained background movement throughout.
shots.subtitle: 雨停了，情绪还没有散。

shots.subject: Lin in three-quarter profile under reflected neon light
shots.action: slowly raises the head and looks into the distance
shots.camera: slight handheld texture with a gentle push-in
shots.style: cinematic realism, moody blue-red lighting, soft contrast
shots.environment: Keep the same rainy city street, same neon palette, and restrained background movement throughout.
shots.subtitle: 那一刻，像是有什么变了。

shots.subject: Lin from the side as light passes across the face
shots.action: turns and walks away with calm, restrained motion
shots.style: cinematic realism, moody blue-red lighting, soft contrast
shots.environment: Keep the same rainy city street, same neon palette, and restrained background movement throughout.
shots.subtitle: 这一次，终于往前走了。
